title: Add i18next library and mechanically port existing strings
objective: Add react-i18next/i18next, wire an I18nextProvider, and mechanically port strings.en/strings.pl from src/i18n.ts into namespaced JSON files with zero visible behavior change.

include: Add i18next, react-i18next, i18next-browser-languagedetector to package.json, pinned to explicit versions.
Create src/i18nSetup.ts and wire I18nextProvider in src/main.tsx.
Keep src/i18n.ts as a thin re-export shim so existing call sites keep compiling unchanged.
exclude: Removing or rewriting getReportLabels, markdownText, or getKnownErrorMessage.
Extracting new hardcoded strings or aria-labels.
Error-translation layer, formatting, switcher rebuild, pluralization, or test migration work.

done: The app builds and runs with the new i18next provider wired in.
Both locale bundles cover the same key set as strings.en/pl.
A smoke test confirms both namespaces load without missing keys.
